title: MetricDataResult
description: A GetMetricData call returns an array of MetricDataResult structures.

Id.description: The short name you specified to represent this metric.

Label.description: The human-readable label associated with the data.

Timestamps.description: The timestamps for the data points, formatted in Unix epoch time.

Values.description: The data points for the metric corresponding to Timestamps.

StatusCode.description: The status of the returned data.

Messages.description: A list of messages with additional information about the data returned.
